titlestmt.author: compiled by Carol King, Nancy Lyon, and Staff of Manuscripts and Archives

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

conventiondeclaration.abbr: Finding aid created in accordance with Manuscripts and Archives Processing Manual
conventiondeclaration.citation: translation missing: en.enumerations.resource_finding_aid_description_rules.Finding aid created in accordance with Manuscripts and Archives Processing Manual

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Wednesday September 2, 2020 at 09:19

did.unittitle: Sudan collection

descriptivenote.p: The material is in English, Arabic, and French.

did.abstract: The collection consists of printed material and photographs relating to political, economic, and social conditions in Sudan.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Transferred from the African Collection Curator; transferred from Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, 1996.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright status for collection materials is unknown. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Sudan Collection (MS 1543). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

relatedmaterial.head: Associated Materials
relatedmaterial.p: African Collection, MS 605; Pamphlet Collection, MS 1351; African Postcard Collection, MS 1575. Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The material in the first accession is arranged chronologically, with photographs last. Additions to the collection may vary in arrangement.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The collection consists of printed material and photographs relating to political, economic, and social conditions in Sudan.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

did.unittitle: Original accession
On Patrol in the Sudan , by unidentified soldier in the Egyptian army
"In the Dongotona mountains," The Forbidden Land : Southern Sudan: an account of genocide
The Gezira Scheme: informational booklets on the development of this area
Anya Nya, Africans for Ending Genocide in Sudan (AEGIS): newspapers, letters, statements
[Nimeiry, H. E. Gaafar Mohamed?], president of the Democratic Republic of the Sudan, chairman of the Sudanese Socialist Union (SSU): addresses, speeches, programs
Regional Assembly of the Southern Region: Proceedings of the Fifth Session
[al-Jami'ah; majallah thagafiyah yusdiruha Ittihad Tullab Jami'at al-khurtum?], The University Student's Union, University of Kharktoum
Management Development and Productivity Centre: journal
Regional Ministry of Culture and Information, Southern Region of Sudan: magazines, reports
Tigray People's Liberation Front (TPLF): military communiqués, press releases, reports
Muortat-Mayen, G., chairman of Anyanya Patriotic Front (A.P.F.), "The South Sudan Question: The Root Causes"
Amnesty International: newsletters, bulletins
Foreign newspaper clippings
Sudan People's Liberation Movement (SPLM): printed materials, news bulletins
Institute of Current World Affairs: newsletters
Middle East Studies Association of North America (MESA): letters to General Omar Hassan Al-Bashir
Research and Communications International, Ltd.;The Sudan Monitor
Sudan Democratic Gazette: a Newsletter for Democratic Pluralism
Newspapers
National Council for Development Projects; Fourth Annual Meeting for Coordination of Work Plans
Educational/academic journals
The Rahad Irrigation Project: brochures, maps
Sudan National Population Committee (SNPC): bulletins
Fonds Archinard: inventory reports; Parts 1-11, volumes 5147-5601
Fonds Archinard: inventory reports; Parts 12-25, volumes 5602-5749, 6095-6112, 6135, 6638, 6651, 6851
Sennar Dam Opening Ceremony: photograph album with accompanying printed material pertaining to Lord George Ambrose Lloyd, High Commissioner for the Sudan
"The Fung Province, Sudan": photograph album
The Nyima Jebels, Nuba Mountains Province: military sketch map
Copy of the Mahdi's letter to Emin Pasha demanding his surrender
Additional Material
Beny, Ambrose, "Genocide and Slavery in the Sudan: The African and International Response"
Interhemispheric Resource Center (IRC) and Institute for Policy Studies, "Foreign Policy in Focus, Sudan," vol. 2, no. 41
McGonagall, William, poem "General Gordon, The Hero of Khartoum"
Peace and Development Foundation Act
Secretariat for Legal Affairs, "Laws of the New Sudan, The Sudan People's Liberation Army (SPLA) Act"
Slatin, Baron Rudolf Carl, letter concerning the rescue of Neufeld [Charles?]
"Sudan, A Newsletter Committed to the Rights and Liberties of African Sudanese People," vol. IV, no. 4
Sudan Excavation Committee, banquet programs in honor of explorations of Ancient Mero
"The Wells of Abu Klea, or Who Killed John Bull?"
Kidd, K. S. [service reports of a district commissioner among Nilotic tribes near White Nile, Anglo-Egyptian Sudan]
Additional material
Printed material
Posters
